title: Oil prices extend multi-day rally as Trump issues new threat to Iran; Brent tops $114 per barrel
summary_full: The latest move higher comes amid reports that the U.S. will look to extend its blockade of Iranian ports.
summary_public: The latest move higher comes amid reports that the U.S. will look to extend its blockade of Iranian ports.
